name: Special Cake Toppings
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
2. Add cream of tartar and beat in golden brown sugar until stiff peaks form.
3. Spread over unbaked cake batter in a pan.
4. Sprinkle with finely chopped walnuts.
5. Bake as directed.
6. Heat butter or margarine (1/4 cup) with golden brown sugar, flaked coconut, and chopped walnuts.
7. Spread evenly over hot baked cake in a pan.
8. Broil slowly until lightly browned and bubbly.
9. Beat cream cheese (1 small package, 3 oz.) until fluffy.
10. Add vanilla (1 teaspoon), salt (dash).
11. Gradually beat in golden brown sugar (1/2 cup).
12. Whip heavy cream; fold into the cheese mixture.
13. Heap on slices of angel food or pound cake, or use as filling and frosting for two cake layers.
14. For extra treat, top with banana slices.
15. Refrigerate until served.
16. Mix sour cream (1 cup) with golden brown sugar (1 cup) and salt (dash).
17. Spread over unbaked coffee cake dough in a pan.
18. Bake as per recipe instructions.
19. Heat water to boiling (3/4 cup), then lower heat.
20. Add packed golden or dark brown sugar (2 cups).
21. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
22. Add maple flavoring if desired.
23. Pour into pitcher or storage jar. Makes about 1 pint of rich-flavored syrup.
